checks.a_analysis: The output does not contain any fabricated paragraphs or sentences that are not based on the source document. All headings and list structures correspond to the content presented in the source PDF.
The URLs provided in the output (e.g., in Sections 3 and 5) correctly match the URL 'https://myncid.nc.gov/' found in the source document. No fabricated contact information was detected.
All six pages of the source document are represented by sections in the JSON output. While some content within sections is truncated or omitted, no entire section or page is completely missing.
The source document does not contain any tables; therefore, this check is not applicable.

checks.check_name: Significant text omission within a section
checks.a_analysis: There are significant text omissions in several sections. In Section 4 (Page 4), the entire sets of 5-step instructions for 'For an existing MFA method' and 'For a new MFA method' are missing, leaving only the headers. In Section 1 (Page 1), all lists for Email, Text Message, and Phone Call enrollment are missing the login URL and the labels for the action buttons (e.g., 'ADD ENROLLMENT', 'ADD', 'NEXT', 'SUBMIT'), rendering the instructions incomplete.
checks.b_evidence_source: Page 4 contains steps 1-5 for 'For an existing MFA method' (Login to..., In your profile page..., Click on the circle..., Click on: CHANGE, Enter the 8 digit...) and 'For a new MFA method' (Login to..., In your profile page..., Choose the method..., Enter the 8 digit..., Click on: SUBMIT). Page 1 list items include 'Login to https://myncid.nc.gov/' and button labels like 'ADD ENROLLMENT'.
checks.b_evidence_output: Section 4, Reading Order 60, only contains the headers in its list items. Section 1, Reading Order 4, 7, and 10, list items end abruptly (e.g., 'Login to ', 'Click on: ', 'Select “Email” and click: ').
checks.b_evidence_location: Sections 1 and 4, corresponding to Page 1 and Page 4.

checks.check_name: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
checks.a_analysis: In Section 2 (Page 2), the login URL is omitted in the first step of the Authenticator enrollment process.
checks.b_evidence_source: Page 2, Authenticator Step 2: 'Login to https://myncid.nc.gov/ in your computer.'

checks.a_analysis: The output contains repeated headers such as 'MyNCID User Guide for MFA' and 'How to enroll for MFA:', but these repetitions reflect the source document's design where headers appear on multiple pages. No unintentional content duplication (e.g., duplicated paragraphs within a single logical section) was observed.

The heading hierarchy is generally maintained but breaks down significantly on Page 4. The sub-labels 'For an existing MFA method' and 'For a new MFA method', which serve as subheadings (H3) for the instructional blocks in the source, are incorrectly tagged as list items within an H2 section. This results in a skip of the H3 heading level and a misclassification of structural organizational elements as data points.
checks.b_evidence_source: For an existing MFA method (bold blue text serving as a subheader on page 4); For a new MFA method (bold blue text serving as a subheader on page 4)
checks.b_evidence_output: {"text": "For an existing MFA method"} and {"text": "For a new MFA method"} contained within a list (reading_order 60) under a level 2 heading.

checks.a_analysis: The source document does not contain formal tables. The layout uses columns and text blocks, which have been converted into headings and lists. No table structure corruption is applicable.

The reading order for Section 4 (Page 4) is materially broken. Because the instructional steps (1-5 for both methods) are entirely omitted from the text elements, the logical flow of the document's information is lost. A reader moving top-to-bottom would encounter a category header ('Change default MFA...'), then two sub-labels ('For an existing...', 'For a new...'), and then immediately skip to the next page's topic, missing all steps required to complete the task.
checks.b_evidence_source: Page 4 contains two sets of numbered instructions (1-5) following 'For an existing MFA method' and 'For a new MFA method'.
checks.b_evidence_output: The output for Page 4 (Section 4) only contains the main heading and a list with the two sub-labels, followed by images of buttons. The text for steps 1-5 for both methods is missing.

checks.a_analysis: There are several failures in list conversion. First, all numbered lists (1-6 on Page 1, 1-9 on Page 2, 1-4 on Page 3, 5, and 6) are converted into unordered lists, losing the sequential numbering essential for a user guide. Second, the list structure on Page 4 is severely corrupted: the subheadings are included as list items, and the actual instructional steps (the list items themselves) are entirely missing from the textual output. This constitutes a major structural loss.
checks.b_evidence_source: Numbered lists 1-6 on Page 1; Numbered lists 1-5 for two methods on Page 4.
checks.b_evidence_output: {"type": "list", "list_type": "unordered"} used throughout Section 1 (element 4, 7, 10). Instructional steps on Page 4 are omitted.

checks.a_analysis: The output fails to include the URL text 'https://myncid.nc.gov/' in several list items where it is clearly present in the source. In Section 1 (Page 1) and Section 2 (Page 2), the text 'Login to https://myncid.nc.gov/' is truncated to 'Login to ', effectively removing the functional link/reference required for the user to follow the instructions. This is a major omission of critical reference data.
checks.b_evidence_source: Login to https://myncid.nc.gov/ (Page 1, Email Step 1; Page 2, Authenticator Step 2)
checks.b_evidence_location: Section 1, element 4, item 1; Section 2, element 29, item 1

checks.a_analysis: The HTML output converts the multi-column layout of the source PDF into a single-column responsive layout. While this changes the visual relationship between text steps and their corresponding buttons (which are often moved to the bottom of sections), the overall logical flow and organization of information remain consistent with the source. Navigation elements like a Table of Contents have been added correctly.
The source document does not contain any traditional grid-based tables. Data is organized in columns and lists, which are rendered appropriately as text in the HTML.

Several meaningful images and UI elements from the latter half of the document are missing in the HTML rendering. Specifically, page 4's screenshots of a radio button ('Set as default') and checkbox ('Make as default'), as well as the 'CHANGE' button, are absent. Page 5's trash icon and 'REMOVE' button are missing. Page 6's final 'Submit' button is also missing. These images are essential visual cues for a user following the step-by-step instructions.
checks.b_evidence_source: Page 4 shows a radio button screenshot and 'CHANGE' button; Page 5 shows a trash icon and 'REMOVE' button; Page 6 shows a 'Submit' button.
checks.b_evidence_output: The HTML sections for 'Change default MFA enrollment method:', 'Delete MFA method:', and 'Enroll MFA via an application...' are missing these corresponding button and icon images.
checks.b_evidence_location: Sections starting from 'Change default MFA enrollment method:' onwards (corresponds to PDF pages 4-6).

checks.a_analysis: No body content (paragraphs, specific instructions, or data tables) is duplicated in the HTML output. The repetition of the document title and logo is expected as these elements appeared on every page of the source PDF and now denote the start of converted page sections.
